seoTitle: Kulwin vs Kunama — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kulwin and Kunama. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kulwin and Kunama.
heading: Kulwin vs Kunama — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kulwin, New South Wales and Kunama, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kulwin has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Kunama (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kulwin or Kunama safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kulwin has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Kunama scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kulwin scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Kunama scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kulwin or Kunama?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kulwin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
